title: Sara helps line up the burger buns on the picnic table
prompt: Wide cheerful shot of @backyard-grill-area in golden-hour light. @Papa already on the LEFT side at the hot grill wearing @papas-apron, flipping a hamburger patty with the spatula, faint smoke wisps rising. @Sara already standing on the RIGHT side at the red-and-white checkered picnic table, hair in cheerful pigtails, carefully lining up fluffy round burger buns one-by-one in a neat row with intense five-year-old concentration, tongue poking out the corner of her mouth. Sara (proudly to herself): "Bun. Bun. Bun. Bun. PERFECT row of buns." Papa (calling over from the grill, grinning): "My sous-chef! Captain of the Bun Squad!" Sara (puffing up her chest, hands on hips for two seconds): "Captain of the BUN SQUAD, reporting for duty!" She giggles and goes right back to bun-lining.
